log_rates(3) Library Functions Manual log_rates(3)

NAME

log_rates - Logging Rate Limits


- Standard rate limits for log_*_every() macros.

SYNOPSIS

Files


file log_rates.h
Logging rate limit constants (in microseconds).

Macros


#define LOG_RATE_VERY_FAST (100000)
Log rate limit: 0.1 seconds (100,000 microseconds) - for very high frequency operations. #define LOG_RATE_FAST (1000000)
Log rate limit: 1 second (1,000,000 microseconds). #define LOG_RATE_NORMAL (3000000)
Log rate limit: 3 seconds (3,000,000 microseconds). #define LOG_RATE_DEFAULT (5000000)
Log rate limit: 5 seconds (5,000,000 microseconds) - default for audio/video packets. #define LOG_RATE_SLOW (10000000)
Log rate limit: 10 seconds (10,000,000 microseconds).

Detailed Description

Standard rate limits for log_*_every() macros.

Standard rate limits for log_*_every() macros to reduce log spam in high-frequency code paths.

Usage: log_debug_every(LOG_RATE_VIDEO_FRAME, "message")

Macro Definition Documentation

#define LOG_RATE_DEFAULT (5000000)

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/log_rates.h>

Log rate limit: 5 seconds (5,000,000 microseconds) - default for audio/video packets.

#include <include/ascii-chat/common/log_rates.h>
